endpoint.description: Alibaba Cloud Cloud Firewall endpoint, for example cloudfw.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com.

regionId.description: Alibaba Cloud region ID, for example cn-hangzhou.

lang.description: Default CloudFW response language, such as zh or en.

connectTimeout.description: Alibaba Cloud SDK connect timeout in milliseconds.

readTimeout.description: Alibaba Cloud SDK read timeout in milliseconds.

timeoutMs.description: Alias used as both connectTimeout and readTimeout when the specific fields are absent.
